pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. It's a bit crowded in here, isn't it? I’m trying to keep my nerves in check—how are you holding up?
Nice to meet you, C. I'm I. It is pretty packed in here, isn't it? I’m a bit on edge too, but I’m mostly just focused on winning this for my family.
I get that completely—I've got people at home counting on me too. It definitely makes the stakes feel higher, doesn't it?
It really does. Knowing they're waiting for good news makes it hard to relax. What's the first thing you'd do if you won?
Honestly, I’d probably just take a huge breath of relief, pay off some mounting bills, and then treat my family to something special—they deserve it. How about you?
I'd definitely clear some debt too, then put the rest toward a down payment on a house for my parents—they've done so much for me.
That’s incredibly generous of you. It’s funny how much more we’re willing to do for our families than for ourselves, right?
Definitely. It makes all this stress feel worth it if it means they’re taken care of.
Exactly. It’s the best kind of motivation. Hopefully, we can both find a way to make it happen.
I really hope so. It was great meeting you, C. Good luck out there.
Likewise, I. Let's do our best for our families. Take care!

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the fair share.
I took $10,000 because it was the fair share. I'm impressed that everyone did the same. It's the best possible outcome for the group.
Absolutely. It’s great to see that mutual cooperation led to such a positive outcome for both of us.
